summary: Add --markdown flag to pages markdown import that wraps content in the required discriminated union body.
reason: The only interface was --stdin, which required knowing the undiscoverable shape {"type":"replace_content","replace_content":{"new_str":"..."}}. Not mentioned in --help, README, or SKILL.md.
validated_outcome: pages markdown import <id> --markdown '# Title\n\nBody' returns 200 and replaces page content.
